diff:
diff --git a/textutils.py b/textutils.py
index 583e147..d3fc57e 100644
--- a/textutils.py
+++ b/textutils.py
@@ -3,4 +3,5 @@ import re
 def slugify(text):
     text = text.lower().strip()
     text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
+    text = re.sub(r"-+", "-", text).strip("-")
     return text
